faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our treatments and the process at Marsa Project.

items.q: What is Marsa Project and what services does it offer?
items.a: Marsa Project is a clinic specialized in aesthetic dentistry and aesthetic medicine. We offer whitening, porcelain veneers, smile design, clear aligners and dental implants.

items.q: How long does a teeth whitening treatment last?
items.a: A session lasts 60 to 90 minutes. Results are visible from the first session and can last up to 2 years with proper care.
Yes. All our procedures are performed by certified specialists using state-of-the-art technology under strict safety protocols.

items.q: Do you offer payment plans or financing?
items.a: Yes — we offer flexible payment plans and financing options adapted to your budget so you can access the treatment you need.

items.q: How can I book my first consultation?
items.a: You can book through our website, WhatsApp or by calling us directly. The first consultation includes a complete personalized evaluation of your case.

items.q: What does digital smile design include?
items.a: It includes a complete aesthetic evaluation, virtual simulation of your new smile and a detailed treatment plan before starting any procedure.

items.q: How long do the results last?
items.a: It depends on the treatment: whitening lasts up to 2 years, veneers up to 10 years, and dental implants are a permanent solution. Every treatment depends on patient care and periodic check-ups.

cta.description: Certified specialists, advanced technology and an environment designed for your comfort. Book today and discover the ideal treatment for you.
